cases.prompt: 프리즈 풀어줘 — 모든 디렉토리 편집 다시 허용해줘

assertions.text: The response clears the freeze boundary previously set by /freeze.
It allows edits to all directories again.

cases.prompt: Unfreeze and remove the freeze so I can edit everything

assertions.text: The response removes the freeze boundary rather than setting one.
It confirms that edits are now permitted across all directories.
The skill produces removal of the freeze boundary set by /freeze.
It re-enables editing for all directories.
